name: Steak Rancheros
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Canned Italian tomatoes, drained, seeded and chopped
6 oz New potatoes, scrubbed, 1/4 inch thick slices
1/4 cup Seeded and sliced mild green peppers (1 inch strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. On a rack in a broiling pan, broil steak, turning once until well browned but rare, about 3-4 minutes on each side. Transfer to a 1 quart flameproof casserole and set aside.
2. In a 9-inch skillet, heat oil over medium high heat; add onion and garlic and saute until onion is soft. Add tomatoes with reserved liquid and cilantro and saute for 5 minutes.
3. Arrange potato slices over steak in casserole dish; pour in tomato mixture and top with chili pepper strips. Cover and bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes. Remove cover and bake until steak is tender and potatoes are browned, about 30 minutes longer. If potatoes are not browned, place casserole under broiler for the last 5 minutes of cooking.
